settings_desc: App preferences (port / theme / startup options) will be available in T1.0.4.
about_desc: Open the production website for documentation, downloads, and release notes.
model_mapping_hint: When the model name requested by the client does not match the target provider, it is automatically replaced with the corresponding model in this table.
config_export_desc: Export your provider configuration as an encrypted file, or import a previously exported configuration. API keys are not included in exports.
config_import_success: Import successful - providers and settings applied
config_export_password_prompt: Enter a password to encrypt the export:
config_import_password_prompt: Enter the password used to encrypt this file:
config_template_selected: Template "{{name}}" selected - add your API key in the Providers tab to activate
